name: LiteLLM
description: LiteLLM is an OpenAI-compatible LLM proxy with cost tracking, load balancing, and observability. Runs the official Docker Compose stack.

notes.text: Requires LXC nesting (Docker). Master key and secrets are saved to ~/litellm.creds.
Uses the official BerriAI Docker Compose stack (litellm, PostgreSQL, Prometheus).
LITELLM_SALT_KEY cannot be changed after models are added to the proxy.
